programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: The Doobie Brothers - Live At Wolf Trap
programme.desc: Filmed in high definition on 25 July 2004 at Wolf Trap National Park for the Performing Arts in Virginia, Live At Wolf Trap captures The Doobie Brothers in fine form on a set that mixes classic hits with some rarely performed tracks.

programme.title: Carlos Santana - Greatest Hits: Live at Montreux 2011
programme.desc: Masterfully filmed in Montreux in July of 2011, this epic show captures the band performing their classics hits such as Jingo, Evil Ways and Black Magic Woman their later No.1 hits Maria, Maria and Smooth. Music video by Carlos Santana __© 2011 Montr...

programme.title: Elton John: Live in London 2013
programme.desc: Filmed at the Roundhouse in London, this concert film gives fans a live experience from start to finish; Elton John performs his hits: "Tiny Dancer," "Rocket Man," "Your Song," and many more.

programme.title: Foo Fighters - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: Green Day: Live at Fox Theater
programme.desc: Green Day performs from "21st Century Breakdown", at the Fox Theater in the band's hometown, Oakland, California.

programme.title: Keith Richards - Under Review
programme.desc: Documentary featuring exclusive interviews, obscure footage and seldom seen photographs.

programme.title: It's Showtime at the Apollo
programme.desc: It's Showtime at the Apollo is a syndicated music television show, first broadcast on September 12, 1987. The show features live performances from both professional and up-and-coming artists, and also features the Amateur Night competition.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Former heavyweight boxing champion Muhammad Ali is interviewed.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Mrs. Georgia Jackson, mother of slain Soledad Brother George Jackson, is interviewed by producer- Ellis Haizlip. Other show features include the exciting Latin-jazz sounds of seven man combo.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: This program traces the roots of Black protest in America by means of passages from Frederick Douglass' greatest orations, dramatized by Arthur Bufghardt, interspersed with performances by drummer Max Roach.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Author James Baldwin is interviewed by the young Black poetess Nikki Giovanni in a special two-part presentation of Soul!, taped in London.

programme.title: Hamilton: One Shot To Broadway
programme.desc: The story of the hit musical that changed Broadway forever and brought the genius of Lin Manuel Miranda to the attention of legions of fans across the world. Featuring interviews with Miranda, as well as the cast and crew of Hamilton.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Former heavyweight boxing champion Muhammad Ali, South African born singer Miriam Makeba and a three-man vocal group called the Delfonics, share the spotlight with guest-host Nikki Giovanni, who opens the show with her "Kidnap Poem".

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Singer Jerry Butler headlines this episode, together with his back-up group, Peaches. Highlights of their numbers are "Make It Easy on Yourself" and "Brand New Me".

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: An all jazz line-up on this edition of Soul! features pianist Horace Silver at the electric keyboard, Lee Morgan on trumpet and 22-year old Bobbi Humphrey playing the flute. They are joined by vocalists Andy and Salome Bey.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: One of the great Motown acts of the past several years headlines the show, performing the hit, "I Heard It through the Grapevine", and other selections.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Highlights feature guest Al Green singing "Let's Stay Together" and author Verta Mae Grosvenor reading form her latest book, Thursdays and Every Other Sunday Off.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real Bob Ross classic - the majestic snow-covered mountain, rolling foothills, leafy trees and bushes, and serene lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Rich, soft colors prove that fall has arrived! Join Bob Ross as he paints a quiet pond and surrounding foliage preparing themselves for a season of slumber.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Kick-off your shoes and let the fragrant grassy meadow tickle your toes - a fantastic Bob Ross summertime landscape to enjoy.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross brings springtime to the canvas, all-around a tiny cabin set in a landscape of hazy green hills and cottony clouds.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: The glow of a midnight moon yields brilliant jewel tones in the surging surf of this dramatic Bob Ross seascape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Supple sky, fluffy trees, and a playful rushing river are created by Bob Ross, simply from correcting common mistakes on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A snowy mountain range, an ice-covered lake, and a lost little cabin combine to create a wintry testimony to Bob Ross' artistic magic.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A fantastic Bob Ross seascape today - enjoy the golden, pink, and mauve tones in the sky and crashing waves.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A truly graceful scene, as if floating in air -- icy pond and weather-worn cabin -- is today's Bob Ross winter landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A cleverly constructed shape on canvas! Peek through the panes with artist Bob Ross and share a beautiful snowy day outside.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Luscious green grass and fresh evergreens, purple and pink sky -- giving the water a perfect glow in this Bob Ross black canvas masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Truly picture perfect. A bright day and still water combine to make amazing mirrored images throughout this Bob Ross mountain masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Step into an oval classic with Bob Ross and get inspired by the gorgeous browns and oranges of undoubtedly the most beautiful season of all.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a majestic stand of evergreen trees overlooking tiny, sweet little flowers growing on a sloping knoll.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Cross a frozen stream under the shelter of a grand covered bridge and enjoy the tranquility of a beautiful Bob Ross winter's day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross employs a unique technique, using both black and white basecoats, to create a happy little stream tumbling down a rocky meadow.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross teaches us the secret of his wet-on-wet technique while creating a restless ocean crashing against a rugged rocky coastline.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A path of cacti and rocks lead right up to a bold sun setting in a dramatic red sky, all from the delicate motions of Bob Ross' paint brush.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Today's beautiful Bob Ross painting focuses on both an awesome cloudy sky, and a turbulent sea of crashing waves.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel with Bob Ross and enjoy a spectacular view -- this painting presents a fabulous lesson in creating rugged and rocky natural surfaces.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Powerful clouds, rolling hills, and winding river waters -- Bob Ross creates this masterpiece using only his special painting knife.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a little walk with Bob Ross as he shows you how to create the same mountain landscape setting in both summer and winter!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross combines the simple elements of a sky, a mountain, and a lake to produce this ultra-soft tribute to nature.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Using a different technique or two, Bob Ross creates a fascinating scene - watch the sun drop below the horizon, just behind the shadow of trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: As the foliage reaches its peak of autumn beauty, experience the tranquility of a nice meadow, pond, and happy birch trees - all painted the Bob Ross way!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Today Bob Ross creates a fantastic southwestern mountain scene with spectacular red peaks looming over a lazy, tree-lined stream.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross as he paints a lovely scenic mountain surrounded by quiet, soft, misty foothills - a beautiful painting that even a beginner can do with ease!

programme.desc: Robert E. Lee's estate becomes a burial ground for Union soldiers, counterfeiters attempt to steal Abraham Lincoln's body, and an embalmed bandit makes his way around the country. Featuring Jason Ritter, Justin Long and Jimmy O. Yang.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Questlove, Method Man, Raven-Symone and more celebrate the early history of hip hop, the man known for inventing Motown, Berry Gordy, and "Star Trek" actress Nichelle Nichols's incredible activism on and off the TV screen.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: An Italian handyman steals the "Mona Lisa," the "Santa bandits" rob a bank in Texas, and Mossad agents capture a Nazi general in Argentina. Featuring Jack Black, Johnny Knoxville, Tony Hale, "Weird Al" Yankovic and Rachel Bloom.

programme.title: MST3K: Demon Squad

programme.desc: Joel and the Bots get tips on public speaking from the short Speech: Using Your Voice and watch a spider devour a town in Earth vs the Spider (1958)

programme.desc: Kinga, drops a bombshell on Jonah before plunging him into a world of bare-chested carnies, talking chimps, brooding magicians and young love.

programme.title: MST3K: The Day Time Ended
programme.desc: In part four of a Gauntlet six-movie binge, Jonah and the bots take on the 1979 film The Day Time Ended.

programme.title: Backlot: MST3K 25th Anniversary

programme.title: MST3K: The Time Travelers
programme.desc: A botched experiment hurls a group of scientists into a bleak future full of mutants, androids and catty humans in this 1964 sci-fi romp.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Swamp Diamonds

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Black Scorpion

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse is attracted to a beautiful psychic, who also happens to be the prime suspect in a murder. Amanda copes with the trials of motherhood.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The daughter of one of Mark's friends writes a juicy tell-all expose of the most prominent public figures. Mark takes her in after a crazed stalker starts threatening her and her co-authors.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark investigates a perky morning television personality for the murder of a Howard Stern-like radio host.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan is the executor of his friend, Preston Michael's, estate after Michaels is found in the body of a shark.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A friendly-fire incident involving a veteran cop leaves Steve's friend dead, but the shooting only appears to be unintentional.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse and Dr. Sloan have contact with a contagious victim of a genetically altered smallpox strain.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A skater stages an attack on herself to win endorsements, then ices her accomplice---and frames her rival for the killing.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Soft music, candles, and a lifeless body dressed in lovely lingerie. These are the trademarks of 'The Casanova Killer,' a serial murderer who leaves only a stain of blood near the heart, and the sole of a foot marred by an 'X,' as forensic evidence.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A terrorist bombing ignites an undercover investigation involving an ambitious cop.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan finds a murder victim among the trauma patients from a major bus accident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Grease 2
programme.desc: Return to rockin’ Rydell High for a whole new term! It’s 1961, two years after the original "Grease" gang graduated, and there’s a new crop of seniors – and new members of the coolest cliques on campus.

programme.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Grossing the highest box-office of any British film in the US when released in 1975, this "cult classic" comedy from the Monty Python team loosely follows the legend of King Arthur, along with his squire and his Knights of the Round Table.

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: Bill Murray stars as Tripper who guides a fun-seeking collection of lovable campers and libidinous staff members through the unique pleasures of a hysterical coed summer experience.

programme.title: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: Cheech and Chong make their film debut in this riotous rock'n'roll comedy, bringing with them the same madness, lifestyles and sketches that sold over 10 million records in the early 1970s.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Grease is the one that you want! Go back to high school with Pink Lady Sandy (Olivia Newton-John), leader of the bad-boy T-Birds, Danny (John Travolta), and a rockin' and rollin' all-star cast.

programme.title: Grease 2
programme.desc: Return to rockin’ Rydell High for a whole new term! It’s 1961, two years after the original "Grease" gang graduated, and there’s a new crop of seniors – and new members of the coolest cliques on campus.

programme.title: Annie Hall
programme.desc: Woody Allen is in prime form in this celebrated comedy and 1977 Best Picture Oscar®-winner in which he portrays a highly neurotic comedy writer who falls head-over-heels in love with a naive small-town girl (Diane Keaton) who aspires to be a singer.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Rambo refuses to join his friend and former mentor, Colonel Trautman, on a mission to Afghanistan. The mission fails and Trautman is captured by Russian troops. Now Rambo must infiltrate the Russian fortress to save his only friend.

programme.title: The Goonies
programme.desc: With brothers Mikey and Brand's house slated for demolition by greedy developers, the boys' only hope lies in finding a long-lost treasure. They uncover a treasure map and, with their friends, descend to a subterranean sea and an abandoned galleon.

programme.title: Gremlins
programme.desc: The rules for a Mogwai are simple: Keep your Mogwai away from water, bright lights and, most importantly, never feed him after midnight. But in Kingston Falls the rules are broken, and the consequences multiply at an alarming rate.

programme.title: Summer Rental
programme.desc: Comedy sensation John Candy plays the stressed-out air traffic controller whose much-needed family holiday yields one hysterical misadventure after another.

programme.title: Summer School
programme.desc: Schools out, and Ocean Front High gym teacher Freddy Shoop (Mark Harmon) has big plans: summer in Hawaii. But the schools vice-principal has plans for Freddy, too: teaching remedial English. Aloha paradise - hello, Summer School.

programme.title: The Goonies
programme.desc: With brothers Mikey and Brand's house slated for demolition by greedy developers, the boys' only hope lies in finding a long-lost treasure. They uncover a treasure map and, with their friends, descend to a subterranean sea and an abandoned galleon.

programme.title: Face/Off
programme.desc: As a result of a new medical technique, an agent is able to surgically take on the identical appearance of a criminal in order to take down his terrorist organization.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: Writer-director Quentin Tarantino delivers an iconic cast of characters in PULP FICTION, a wildly entertaining tale of violence and redemption. John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman, and Bruce Willis star in this pop culture phenomenon.

programme.title: Election
programme.desc: Reese Witherspoon plays Tracy Flick, a straight-A go-getter determined to be president of Carver High’s student body. Popular teacher Jim McAllister (Broderick) decides to derail Tracy’s obsessive overachieving by recruiting an opposition candidate.

programme.title: Grumpy Old Men
programme.desc: Jack Lemmon and Walter Matthau portray lifelong feuding neighbors making each day a hilarious game of revenge. But then voluptuous Ariel moves in nearby and their dormant hormones reignite in an all-out competition to win her favor.

programme.title: Grumpier Old Men
programme.desc: In this sequel to Grumpy Old Men, a vivacious Italian beauty attempts to convert Wabasha, Minnesota's cherished bait store into a romantic Italian restaurant.

programme.title: Neil Simon's The Odd Couple II
programme.desc: The times may have changed, but thankfully not the traits that make ex-roomies Felix Ungar (Lemmon) and Oscar Madison (Matthau) the all-time perfect mismatch.

programme.title: Spy Kids
programme.desc: Super-spies Gregorio (Antonio Banderas) and Ingrid (Carla Gugino) give up their lives of intrigue to raise their children. After a sinister super-villain kidnaps the parents, it's up to the kids to come to the rescue.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: In the sequel, the OSS now has a full child-spy section and our hero siblings Carmen and Juni Cortez have become agents. On a mission to recover a dangerous device that threatens the entire world, they enlist the skills of their family.

programme.title: Spy Kids 3: Game Over
programme.desc: Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alexa Vega, and Daryl Sabara return in this third installment of the popular SPY KIDS trilogy that finds Carmen kidnapped by an evil Toymaker (Sylvester Stallone) and imprisoned inside a virtual reality game.

programme.title: RV (2006)
programme.desc: A forced family vacation in a recreational vehicle rapidly turns into a disaster.

programme.title: Texas Rangers
programme.desc: After the Civil War, Texas is at the mercy of murderous bandits. A group of unlikely heroes emerges to battle these renegade outlaws. Out-manned, they summon the courage to protect the innocent and put the wrong things right in their beloved homeland.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers

programme.desc: Based on the 1996 novel, this is a mixture of thriller and black comedy. Harry Pendel is the tailor to the powerful of Panama. Harry is known for his storytelling and suits, but soon his tales carry lethal repercussions.
